commit.message:
fix: Wait for operator deployment ready before applying resources (#17)

Wait for rhods-operator deployment to have all replicas ready before
applying custom resources. This ensures the operator pods are fully
initialized and webhooks are registered, reducing race conditions where
DSCInitialization conversion webhook fails with "service not found".

The wait:
- Checks that readyReplicas == spec.replicas (all replicas ready)
- Has 2-minute timeout with 5-second check intervals
- Shows warning but continues if timeout (non-blocking)
- Includes 5-second buffer after deployment ready for webhook registration

This improves CI reliability without being overly strict about timing.

Signed-off-by: Eleanor Hu <ehu@redhat.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Tweak groups-features spacing and center list items

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix BetUS navigation: use 'load' instead of 'domcontentloaded'

ASP.NET UpdatePanels render game content AFTER domcontentloaded,
causing empty pages (~9KB) for non-NBA sports. Switch to 'load'
with 45s timeout and 15s selector wait for .game-tbl/.bn-lines.

Also: increase stale TTL to 600s (prefetch cycles take ~4-7min),
and only update cache with non-empty results to prevent data loss.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Lazy-load song database and optimize score rendering

- Lazy-load songs-data.js (~157KB) via dynamic import() so the
  welcome screen renders without waiting for the song database
- Add initSongs() async loader called during App.init()
- Optimize renderScores() to update existing DOM elements in-place
  instead of full innerHTML rebuild on every turn
- Remove unused defaultSongCount property
- Bump SW cache to v36

Build full portal with all pages from product strategy

Implement the complete Stream for Business portal matching the
product strategy IA:

- Dashboard: payroll overview, action items, cashflow forecast, activity
- Payroll: history, deadlines, and 5-step guided Run Payroll flow

- Settings: company details, HMRC connection, pension, Xero, RBAC

Added react-router-dom for navigation and additional Shadcn components
(badge, avatar, tabs, separator, progress, dialog, select, etc).

Fix dotted field keys not updating effective_view

When editing nested fields like "applicant_data.employment_type" from
the dashboard, the dotted key was stored as a flat string in facts
instead of as a nested dict. This meant effective_view couldn't find
the value via path traversal. Now unflatten dotted keys before saving.

fix: orderDirection being ignored by Outseta API (#5)

Axios encodes `+` as `%2B` in query params, but Outseta expects
a literal `+` (URL-encoded space). Use a space character instead,
which Axios encodes as `+`, matching the expected format.

commit.message:
feat: add P_14_xW (VAT in PLN) support for foreign currency invoices

Foreign currency invoices (EUR, USD, etc.) require P_14_xW fields
containing VAT amounts converted to PLN using the exchange rate.
Added exchangeRate field to DraftInvoice model, xml-builder generates
P_14_xW for both standard and correction invoices when rate is set.
Updated ksef_correction_zero tool to accept exchangeRate parameter.

Feature: Detect natural-language refusals as unanswered questions

AI often ignores [UNABLE_TO_ANSWER] marker and writes its own refusal
like "参照情報には含まれていません". Now detects both:
- Exact marker → replace with unable_response text + log
- Refusal patterns → keep AI response as-is + log for admin review

commit.message:
Rewrite BetUS scraper DOM extraction with correct selectors

The BetUS site uses .game-tbl for per-game containers (not .game-block,
which is a single wrapper for all games). Updated _JS_EXTRACT to:
- Iterate .game-tbl elements
- Extract team names from .visitor/#awayName and .home/#homeName
- Parse spread/ML/total from .line-container a.bet-link elements
- Handle ½ character conversion to .5

Also fixed navigation: use domcontentloaded instead of networkidle
(BetUS has persistent analytics connections that prevent idle state).

Fix: Department match must not bypass reference-data check

AI was matching department keywords (e.g. "看護") and then fabricating
answers using general knowledge. Updated department prompt to explicitly
state: even after identifying the department, if the specific answer is
not written in the reference data, return [UNABLE_TO_ANSWER].

commit.message:
fix: spread Keepa pricing sync across day to prevent stuck jobs (#242)

* fix: spread Keepa pricing sync across day to prevent stuck jobs

The pricing sync was consuming all Keepa tokens in ~7 minutes then
stalling for the rest of the day (429 rate limits → Vercel timeout →
status stuck as "running" with no Discord alert).

Changes:
- Rewrite sync to budget-spread strategy: ~57 ASINs per 30-min
  invocation instead of 80 ASINs hammered at 4am
- Prioritise in-stock ASINs (same-day freshness) over stale items
  (3-4 day cycle)
- Add safety timer to stop 30s before Vercel timeout
- Handle 429 gracefully (stop batch, return partial progress)
- Add stuck-sync detection (zero_progress_count → Discord alert
  after 3 consecutive zero-progress invocations)
- GCP driver: reduce amazon-pricing to 1 iteration (self-contained),
  return 500 on max-iterations timeout
- Buy box table: add Data column showing snapshot age
- Reset stuck pricing_sync status via migration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: replace N+1 queries with single RPC and exclude already-refreshed ASINs

- Replace 10+ paginated Supabase queries in getPrioritisedAsins with a
  single get_keepa_priority_asins RPC (SQL function with UNION, LEFT JOIN,
  and priority sorting)
- Exclude ASINs already refreshed today from tier 2, preventing
  duplicate Keepa token spend on same-day re-syncs
- Regenerate Supabase types to include new RPC

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix: Prevent AI from fabricating answers using general knowledge

Three changes to enforce reference-data-only responses:
1. Reduce default temperature from 0.7 to 0.3 (less creative/fabrication)
2. Limit conversation history to 5 messages (prevent old pattern learning)
3. Skip saving assistant response to history when unanswered (prevent
   AI from learning incorrect response patterns from past sessions)

commit.message:
docs: architecture.excalidraw — full system data-flow diagram

Shows all components and flows:
- HTTP layer (Tomcat threads): Sensor → POST /events → queue → 503/202;
  Ops Client → PUT /services + GET /graph
- Processing layer (Worker threads): classification check → Caffeine cache
  fast-path (HIT=skip) → PostgreSQL INSERT ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING →
  markSeen → AlertSeverityResolver (ConcurrentHashMap) → SLF4J JSON alert
- Shared PostgreSQL node with both table PKs
- Evidence panel: INSERT SQL, JSON alert log format, TripleKey fields
- All arrows labelled with data types and key conditions

selecting a region. Uses imagemagick to crop the captured image.

fix: add Vite plugin to copy ONNX WASM files to deps cache

ONNX Runtime dynamically imports its WASM loader (.mjs) at runtime.
Vite's dep optimizer doesn't handle this correctly, so we copy the
required files to the deps cache directory during config resolution.

- Edit button (pencil icon) on each document row
- Triggers readiness recheck after type change
- Document _id now included in case detail API response

Document filter:
- Dropdown filter by document type in doc table header
- Shows only types present in current case

Google Drive import:
- Split into two buttons: "Persoenliches" and "Objektunterlagen"
- Each prompts for a separate Google Drive link

Readiness auto-recheck: already works - both update-field and
override endpoints trigger check_readiness(), so changing
employment_type automatically recalculates required documents.

fix: switch CSP to report-only mode — unblock app while diagnosing violations

CSP was blocking threshold/graph after backend hardening deploy.
Switched to Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only so violations are
logged (not blocked) while we identify the exact directives needed.
Also added fonts.googleapis.com to style-src (confirmed gap).

commit.message:
fix: remove onnxWASMBasePath to let Vite handle ONNX WASM bundling

onnxWASMBasePath causes ONNX runtime to dynamically import .mjs files
which Vite cannot serve from public/. Removing this option lets Vite's
default pre-bundling handle ONNX runtime WASM loading correctly.

commit.message:
feat: multi-stage Dockerfile, production-ready docker-compose

Dockerfile:
- Stage 1 (builder): full JDK image; Gradle wrapper + build files copied
  first for layer caching — dependency resolution layer survives source
  changes. Runs bootJar inside Docker — no pre-built jar required.
- Stage 2 (runtime): lean JRE-only image; non-root user (appuser) for
  defence-in-depth; JVM flags: UseContainerSupport, MaxRAMPercentage=75,
  faster entropy source for container startup.

docker-compose.yml:
- Removed deprecated top-level 'version' field.
- postgres: named volume (postgres_data) for data persistence across
  restarts; start_period added to healthcheck so slow-start containers
  don't fail before pg_isready is available; restart: unless-stopped.
- app: healthcheck via /actuator/health; restart: unless-stopped;
  depends_on postgres with service_healthy condition.
- DB name/user/password aligned to project name (dataprocessing).

application.properties: updated default DB URL/credentials to match
docker-compose (dataprocessing). Testcontainers tests override via
@DynamicPropertySource so they are unaffected.

README: 'docker-compose up --build' is now the only command needed —
no prior bootJar step. Added 'docker-compose up -d postgres' for local
development workflow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix DraftKings showing 0 events: cache base lines immediately

The DraftKings scraper navigates 8-12 pages sequentially (main lines,
team props, quarters, player props) with 15s timeouts each. Previously
it only cached data after ALL pages completed (~2-4 min). Now it caches
intermediate results after base lines load so the composite can serve
DraftKings data within seconds of startup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
